title: pelargonium × callodon
intro: Pelargonium × callodon, also known as Mountain Rose Geranium or Pelargonium roseum, is a hybrid plant species of the genus Pelargonium. It is a popular ornamental plant, but its leaves and flowers have been used in traditional medicine for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × callodon include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of menopause, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and aid in wound healing. Herbal preparations of Pelargonium × callodon, such as teas and tinctures, can be made from its leaves and flowers, and are often used in aromatherapy and as a natural remedy for various health issues.
